name: DocSend
description: DocSend is commonly used to support capital / fundraising workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use DocSend when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in capital / fundraising work.
founderWorkflow: Use DocSend to keep capital / fundraising work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding DocSend before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
